text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I received a taiyaki from Falcon earlier.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But I can't eat it until my break, which is still 
a whole eighty-three seconds away…

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A moderate amount of sugar after practice 
works wonders for the fatigue we feel after 
exerting ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
…Is it just me, or is time moving 
slower today?
